summary: Phase 11 Backend Testing Complete - All visit routes migrated from server.py to routes/visits.py are working correctly. 47/47 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Basic midwife visits routes properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT /api/midwife/visits working correctly
Prenatal visit assessments with vitals and well-being scores properly migrated - full CRUD at /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits
Birth summaries routes properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT /api/midwife/birth-summaries with duplicate prevention
Provider unified visits routes properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/provider/visits with auto-appointment creation
Visit summary auto-generation working correctly - generates summary from BP, FHR, FH, Weight
Role-based access control verified - Doula correctly denied access to all visit routes (403)
No MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors - all responses properly exclude _id field
Client validation working - 404 returned for non-existent clients in prenatal visits
Proper error handling - 404 for non-existent visits, 400 for duplicate birth summaries
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed visits, prenatal assessments, and birth summaries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 backend refactoring complete. All visit routes have been migrated from monolithic server.py to routes/visits.py (~488 lines migrated). This includes: Basic midwife visits (CRUD), Prenatal visit assessments with vitals and well-being scores (CRUD), Birth summaries with duplicate prevention, Provider unified visits with auto-appointment creation. Server.py reduced from 4,646 to 4,158 lines. All endpoints verified with 47 passing tests.

endpoints: GET /api/midwife/visits - List all visits (with optional client_id filter)
POST /api/midwife/visits - Create new visit with split notes
GET /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits - List all prenatal visits for client
POST /api/midwife/clients/{client_id}/prenatal-visits - Create prenatal assessment with vitals and well-being scores
POST /api/midwife/birth-summaries - Create birth summary (one per client)
GET /api/provider/visits - List unified visits (with filters: client_id, visit_type, include_inactive_clients)
POST /api/provider/visits - Create visit with auto-appointment creation

role_based_access.note: Doula correctly denied access to all visit routes - GET/POST /api/midwife/visits (403), GET/POST /api/midwife/birth-summaries (403), GET/POST /api/provider/visits (403), prenatal visits (403)

objectid_serialization.note: All visit responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field - no serialization errors

visit_summary_generation.note: Auto-generates summary from vitals (BP, FHR, FH, Weight) in both provider visits and prenatal assessments

mocked_apis.note: Visit routes use real database queries. All CRUD operations tested against live MongoDB.
